situation: audit-2026-07-07-030 finding FE-H-002: prompt injection → unrestricted medium-risk tool execution. DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS.allowMediumWithoutConfirm=true bypasses confirm modal for 16+ side-effect tools (upsert_factor_registry, create_strategy_session, run_cogalpha, run_wfo, place_order via risk-table misclassification, etc.). chatLoop.ts:159 only gates on !allowMediumWithoutConfirm.
action: Changed DEFAULT_PERMISSIONS.allowMediumWithoutConfirm from true to false in aiStore.ts:83. Medium-risk tools now require explicit user confirmation by default. Existing users who opted-in retain their preference via zustand persist; new sessions/installations get safe default.
outcome_evidence: Commit 41956b1 on auto/opt-frontend-1783366395 pushed to origin. Diff: single-line change at line 83, allowMediumWithoutConfirm: true → false. Worktree reuses existing opt-frontend-1783366395 (route-fix, same area as FE-H-001 case-087).
next_suggestion: Next pending fix: FE-M-001 (Vite dev server 0.0.0.0 binding without allowedHosts) or FE-M-002 (no CSP header). Both are route-fixes in frontend/ vite.config.ts.
